## What does this PR do?

<!-- A new script, a fix, or a tweak? Which script (folder slug)? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The script lives in `scripts/<slug>/<slug>.user.js` (folder name == file slug).
- [ ] The metadata block is complete (`@name`, `@namespace`, `@version`,
      `@description`, `@author`, `@license`, a `@match`/`@include` target,
      `@grant`, `@downloadURL`, `@updateURL`).
- [ ] `@version` was bumped if this changes an existing script.
- [ ] `@downloadURL` / `@updateURL` point at
      `https://skriptey.github.io/Userscripts/<slug>/<slug>.user.js`.
- [ ] `npm run validate` passes locally.
- [ ] I tested the script in a userscript manager on the target site.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal data are committed.

## Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know. -->
